steps.title: Depending of the plankton size fraction...
steps.instruction: Depending of the plankton size fraction samples you have, select : 1 - DNA extraction using NucleoSpin Plant II MINI kits regarding [<20µ] size fractions (samples collected using Niskin bottles or pumping and filtered on polycarbonate filters, diameter 47mm) ; 2 - DNA extraction using NucleoSpin Plant II MIDI kit regarding [>20µ] size fractions (samples collected and prefiltered using a plankton net, and filtered on polycarbonate filters, diameter 47mm).

steps.title: Cut the 47mm filter into small...
steps.instruction: Cut the 47mm filter into small part and put it in a 2mL sterile microtube. Clean cisors and tweezers with DNA away between each sample.

steps.title: Add 25µL of proteinase K (20mg/mL)
steps.instruction: Add 25µL of proteinase K (20mg/mL) . Vortex.

steps.title: Add 100µl of Lysozyme (20mg/ml) to...
steps.instruction: Add 100µl of Lysozyme (20mg/ml) to the crushed filter, vortex and incubate for 5 min at room-temperature.

steps.title: Incubate 2h @ 56°C, 900rpm in the Thermomixer
steps.instruction: Incubate 2h @ 56°C, 900rpm in the Thermomixer.

steps.title: Transfer the lysate with the filter...
steps.instruction: Transfer the lysate with the filter on a NucleoSpin Filter column (purple column). Centrifuge 5min @ 11 000g, at room temperature.

steps.title: Transfer the eluate on a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer the eluate on a new sterile 2mL microtube using a P1000 without touching the pellet.

steps.title: Add 550 µL of buffer PC...
steps.instruction: Add 550 µL of buffer PC to the lysate , mix by pipetting up and down 5 times. Transfer 650µL of precipitate onto a green column (max 650µL). Centrifuge 1min @ 11 000g. Discard the flow-through and replace the column on the collection tube.

steps.title: Repeat Step 9 until all liquid has been loaded
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 9 until all liquid has been loaded.

steps.title: Add 400 µL of buffer PW1...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of buffer PW1 to the membrane of the column. Centrifuge 1min @ 11 000g. Discard the flow-through and replace the column on the collection tube.

steps.title: Add 675 µL of buffer PW2...
steps.instruction: Add 675 µL of buffer PW2 to the membrane of the column. Centrifuge 1min @ 11 000g. Discard the flow-through and replace the column on the collection tube.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of buffer PW2...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of buffer PW2 to the membrane of the column. Centrifuge 2min @ 11 000g. Discard the flow-through and the collection tube. Put the column on a new sterile 1.5mL microtube correctly labeled (sample name, date, operator)

steps.title: Add 50µL of buffer PE (preheated...
steps.instruction: Add 50µL of buffer PE (preheated 65°C) onto the membrane of the column. Incubate 5 min @ 65°C in the thermomixer.Centrifuge 1min @ 11 000g.

steps.title: Repeat Step 13 by adding again...
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 13 by adding again 50µL PE or reelute the membrane with the same eluate to get more concentrated DNA.

steps.title: Measure DNA concentration with Nanodrop or...
steps.instruction: Measure DNA concentration with Nanodrop or Qbit and store the DNA at -20°C (or-80°C for long-term storage).

steps.title: Cut the 47mm filter into small...
steps.instruction: Cut the 47mm filter into small part and put it in a 2mL sterile microtube. Clean cisors and tweezers with DNA away between each sample. Resuspend material from the filter with buffer PL1 using a P1000.

steps.title: Put 400µL of preheated buffer PL1...
steps.instruction: Put 400µL of preheated buffer PL1 in a sterile microtube 2mL for each sample.

steps.title: Add 250µL proteinase K 20mg/mL to each sample
steps.instruction: Add 250µL proteinase K 20mg/mL to each sample. Vortex.

steps.title: Add 100µL lysozyme 100mg/mL
steps.instruction: Add 100µL lysozyme 100mg/mL . Vortex and incubate for 5 min at room-temperature.

steps.title: Seal the Falcon 15mLwith parafilm and...
steps.instruction: Seal the Falcon 15mLwith parafilm and fix them on the incubator plate. Incubate 2 h @ 56°C, under slow shaking.

steps.title: Transfer the lysate with the filter...
steps.instruction: Transfer the lysate with the filter on a NucleoSpin Filter column (purple column). Centrifuge 10min @ 4 500g, at room temperature.

steps.title: Transfer the eluate on a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer the eluate on a new sterile Falcon 15mL using a P1000 without touching the pellet.

steps.title: Add 4,6 mL of buffer PC...
steps.instruction: Add 4,6 mL of buffer PC to the lysate , mix by vortexing 30 sec. Transfer 3,5 mL of precipitate onto a NucleoSpin Plant Midi Column (max 4 mL) with a Collection Tube. Centrifuge 2min @ 4 500g. Discard the flow-through and replace the column on the collection tube.

steps.title: Repeat Step 9 until all liquid has been loaded
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 9 until all liquid has been loaded.

steps.title: Put 3
steps.instruction: Put 3.4mL of preheated buffer PL1 in a Falcon 15mL for each sample.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of buffer PW1...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of buffer PW1 to the membrane of the column. Centrifuge 2min @ 4 500g. Discard the flow-through and replace the column on the collection tube.

steps.title: Add 3 mL of buffer PW2...
steps.instruction: Add 3 mL of buffer PW2 to the membrane of the column. Centrifuge 2min @ 4 500g. Discard the flow-through and replace the column on the collection tube.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of buffer PW2...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of buffer PW2 to the membrane of the column. Centrifuge 10min @ 4 500g. Discard the flow-through and the collection tube. Put the column on a new sterile 15mL Falcon.

steps.title: Add 150µL of buffer PE (preheated...
steps.instruction: Add 150µL of buffer PE (preheated 65°C) onto the membrane of the column. Incubate 5 min @ 65°C in the thermomixer.Centrifuge 2min @ 4 500g.

steps.title: Add again 150µL PE (preheated 65°C)...
steps.instruction: Add again 150µL PE (preheated 65°C) onto the membrane and centrifuge again 2min @ 4500g.

steps.title: After centrifugation, transfer volume of eluted...
steps.instruction: After centrifugation, transfer volume of eluted DNA in a sterile 1.5mL microtube correctly labeled (name, date, operator) onthe both sides.

steps.title: Measure DNA concentration with Nanodrop or...
steps.instruction: Measure DNA concentration with Nanodrop or Qbit and store the DNA at -20°C (or-80°C for long-term storage).
